name: LDM Utilities
description: A small utility mod for Low Detail Mode!

issues.info: Having a problem with the mod? Report the issue on the GitHub repository

auto-ldm.name: Auto LDM
auto-ldm.description: Automatically enables Low Detail Mode on levels that support it

disable-ldm-button.name: Disable LDM button
disable-ldm-button.description: Disable the Low Detail Mode button on levels that do not support it

legacy-ldm-check.name: Legacy LDM Check
legacy-ldm-check.description: Check if the level supplies that it has a Low Detail Mode instead of checking if any of the objects have a High Detail mode property (may be faster on some devices but will not work for levels in the create tab)
